aesthetic_references: どうぶつの森 (Animal Crossing) — K.K. Slider acoustic warmth
天天爱消除 (Happy Match) — satisfying short SFX, escalating combo tones
Joe Hisaishi — space and breath in melodic lines

sfx_catalogue.event: Two tiles successfully connected via path
sfx_catalogue.feel: Soft resonant chime — like a small bell touched briefly; gentle, satisfying, never harsh
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: Short 80ms attack, 600ms decay. Tuned to D major pentatonic. Slight reverb tail suggests open space.
sfx_catalogue.pitch_variance: ±3 semitones randomized per call for naturalness

sfx_catalogue.event: Tile pair clears from the board
sfx_catalogue.feel: Light sparkle burst — crystalline, airy, brief shimmer of light
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: High-frequency shimmer 200–4000 Hz, 350ms total. Soft pitch-up envelope. Suggests dissolution into light.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Two ascending notes — warmly playful, a musical 'yes'
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: Two notes, interval of a perfect fifth (D→A). Koto pluck timbre. 400ms total. Second note slightly louder.
sfx_catalogue.pitch_variance: none — must feel consistent to train player expectation

sfx_catalogue.feel: Three ascending notes, brighter — the melody grows with each chain
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: Three notes ascending D→F#→A (major triad). Mixed koto + soft piano. 600ms. Third note has shimmer tail.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Cascade of notes, celebratory — full pentatonic run upward, warm and radiant
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: 6-note pentatonic cascade D→E→F#→A→B→D'. Acoustic guitar + koto + chime layer. 900ms. Ends with resonant sustain.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Muffled pop + resonant chime — earthy, satisfying, not explosive
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: Low soft pop (like cork from bottle, ~200Hz), immediately followed by upward chime (750ms total). Natural, organic.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Swoosh + clear tone — a gentle sweep across the board, airy and satisfying
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: Soft whoosh (filtered white noise, 300ms) transitioning into a clear single bell tone (A4, 400ms decay). Suggests horizontal motion.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Shimmer + connection chain — magical, sequential, like tiny links of light snapping together
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: High shimmer swell (200ms), followed by 4 rapid mini-chimes in sequence (each 80ms). Total ~600ms. Sparkle-chain character.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Swirl + rearrange whoosh — oceanic, circular, like the board breathing and resetting
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: Circular whoosh (filtered noise panning left→right→center, 400ms). Followed by soft wave-crash tail (300ms). Ocean character intentional.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Ascending arpeggio, warm — a gentle moment of accomplishment, not triumphant fanfare
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: D major arpeggio D→F#→A→D' (4-note, 1.2s total). Acoustic guitar + soft piano. Ends with gentle sustain pad. Warm, not loud.

sfx_catalogue.feel: Multi-layer swell, emotional peak — the island breathes back to life; tears welcome
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: 8-12 seconds. Begins with solo koto note, piano joins at 2s, acoustic guitar at 4s, ambient nature sounds rise at 6s. Peak at 9s with full gentle ensemble, decays to silence. Non-looping.

sfx_catalogue.event: Final lighthouse illumination — game's emotional climax
sfx_catalogue.feel: Full ambient swell + distant bell — the island restored; a moment of profound peace
sfx_catalogue.sonic_description: 20-30 seconds. Solo piano intro (0-5s), koto joins (5-10s), ocean ambience rises (10-15s), full ensemble with wind chimes, guitar, ambient pads (15-22s), distant bell resonates and all fades to gentle ocean sound (22-28s). One-time play only, no loop.

ui_sounds.feel: Soft organic click — like pressing a smooth wooden button; warm, tactile, never harsh
ui_sounds.sonic_description: Short 60ms transient. Muted wooden tap timbre (~400Hz). Slight presence boost at 2kHz for clarity.

ui_sounds.event: Menu or panel slides into view
ui_sounds.feel: Paper slide or gentle whoosh — like unfolding a hand-drawn map; organic, unhurried
ui_sounds.sonic_description: 200ms soft swoosh, gentle high-frequency content. Paper texture character. Slight low-end warmth.

ui_sounds.feel: Gentle reverse whoosh — same paper texture, direction reversed; feels like folding away
ui_sounds.sonic_description: 180ms soft reverse swoosh. Mirror of menu_open with slight pitch-down tail.

ui_sounds.feel: Coin shimmer — light metallic ring; pleasant, suggests value without being garish
ui_sounds.sonic_description: High metallic shimmer, 300ms. Slight pitch bend up. Suggests small coin spinning to rest.

ui_sounds.event: Dialogue text advances (per character or per tap)
ui_sounds.feel: Subtle text-reveal tick — like a typewriter but softer; organic, never irritating at rapid pace
ui_sounds.sonic_description: Very short 30ms soft click. Low volume. Slightly randomized pitch ±2 semitones to avoid robotic repetition. No metallic quality.

ui_sounds.event: Invalid action attempted (no valid path, board locked, etc.)
ui_sounds.feel: Gentle low tone — a soft 'no' that does not scold; like a hollow wooden knock
ui_sounds.sonic_description: 80ms low hollow tap (~180Hz). No sharp attack. Slight warmth. EXPLICITLY NOT a buzzer or alarm.
ui_sounds.forbidden_note: Must not use buzzer, harsh click, or any tone above 800Hz

ui_sounds.feel: Soft single chime — one note, minimal, gentle attention without urgency
ui_sounds.sonic_description: Single C5 chime, 400ms decay. Soft attack. Not piercing. Like a distant door bell.

ui_sounds.feel: Ambient swell in — as if stepping outside and hearing the island for the first time again
ui_sounds.sonic_description: 600ms gentle ambient pad swell. Ocean breath character. Feels like opening a door to the outside.

ui_sounds.feel: Reveal magic shimmer — something new has appeared; wonder, not excitement
ui_sounds.sonic_description: Rising shimmer 400ms + soft chime at peak. Pentatonic scale fragment. Sparkle character without aggression.

ui_sounds.event: Craft material or collectible picked up
ui_sounds.feel: Small satisfying plop — like a smooth pebble dropped into calm water; immediately delightful
ui_sounds.sonic_description: Short 120ms water-drop plop. Soft low-mid thud with high shimmer tail. Organic, physical.

ui_sounds.feel: Warmth swell — like morning light arriving; a small moment of being cared for
ui_sounds.sonic_description: 800ms warm pad swell. Major chord. Acoustic guitar strum at onset. Ends with gentle shimmer. Not loud.

ui_sounds.event: ひなた NPC moment or special interaction beat
ui_sounds.feel: Soft single-note resonance — intimate, present, as if she is just beside you
ui_sounds.sonic_description: Single note, soft piano or koto. E4 or A4, 800ms sustain. No attack transient. Pure, quiet, personal.

bgm_chapters.emotional_tone: Curious, slightly melancholic — the feeling of arriving somewhere unfamiliar but quietly beautiful
instruments: ocean wave field recording (continuous ambient bed)
soft wind chime on phrase endings
bgm_chapters.loop_point_note: Loop seamlessly at phrase end; ocean waves provide natural crossfade camouflage
bgm_chapters.adaptive_notes: Base layer = ocean ambience only. Melody layer (guitar) fades in after 10s of active play. Intensity layer activates on 3+ combo — adds soft percussion (hand drum, very subtle).
bgm_chapters.production_notes: Morning light character. Music should have gaps and breathing room. Ocean waves audible during silences. Never dense.

bgm_chapters.emotional_tone: Focused, rhythmic — the meditative repetition of craft; hands working, mind quiet
instruments: soft hand percussion (light clay-tapping rhythm, 2-3 hit pattern)
sparse acoustic guitar at phrase ends
bgm_chapters.loop_point_note: Loop point aligns with 4-bar koto phrase end
bgm_chapters.adaptive_notes: Base layer = pottery wheel hum + occasional clay sounds. Melody layer = koto. Intensity layer on 3+ combo = adds hand percussion becomes more prominent.
bgm_chapters.production_notes: Rhythmic but never urgent. Repetitive koto patterns should feel hypnotic, not monotonous. Clay-work rhythm is the heartbeat.

bgm_chapters.emotional_tone: Wonder, expansive — stepping into dappled light; the forest is ancient and welcoming
instruments: soft piano (primary melody, wide intervals suggesting space)
long reverb on all melodic elements
bgm_chapters.loop_point_note: Long loop (4-5 minutes) to avoid obvious repetition; birdsong variation ensures freshness
bgm_chapters.adaptive_notes: Base layer = wind + birdsong field recording. Melody layer = piano with heavy reverb. Intensity layer = adds guitar harmonics and brief cicada swell.
bgm_chapters.production_notes: Most spacious of all chapters. Piano notes should decay fully before next note. Heavy reverb suggests cathedral-like forest canopy. Sunlight-through-leaves quality.

bgm_chapters.emotional_tone: Introspective, quiet — walking alone with thoughts; finding peace in solitude
instruments: solo piano (minimal, widely spaced chords — OR —
solo acoustic guitar (fingerpicked, choose one primary)
distant wind ambience (very low in mix)
occasional sound of footsteps on stone (subtle, not metronomic)
bgm_chapters.loop_point_note: Long silences are intentional and part of the composition. Loop should not feel abrupt.
bgm_chapters.adaptive_notes: Base layer = minimal wind ambience, mostly silence. Melody layer = solo instrument, very sparse. Intensity layer on 3+ combo = adds second instrument (the one not chosen as primary) very softly.
bgm_chapters.production_notes: MOST MINIMAL chapter. Silences must not feel like audio dropout — use very subtle ambient room tone underneath. Production note: do NOT fill all the space. Less is more.

bgm_chapters.emotional_tone: Awe, slightly tense — standing at the edge of everything; beauty and vertigo together
instruments: wind field recording (stronger here — coastal cliff)
distant ocean below (low rumble, felt more than heard)
sparse piano phrases at 'star appearance' moments
bgm_chapters.loop_point_note: Music builds slowly over session duration. Hour-long ambient variation recommended.
bgm_chapters.adaptive_notes: Base layer = ambient pads + wind. Melody layer = koto intermittent phrases. Intensity layer = piano joins + ambient layers swell at dusk transition moment.
bgm_chapters.production_notes: Must feel like a long-exposure photograph. Slow-building. Session-length variation important. Stars appearing at dusk is a visual trigger — music should swell subtly at this moment.

bgm_chapters.emotional_tone: Emotional climax — from quiet arrival to radiant restoration; every instrument earned
instruments: ocean ambience (always present, swells at climax)
ambient pads (builds from nothing to full)
bgm_chapters.loop_point_note: Non-looping by design. Ends with natural silence. If level not finished, loops a short ambient section (ocean + piano only) quietly.
bgm_chapters.adaptive_notes: Dynamic structure: quiet start → gradual build → radiant finish. All adaptive layers are used in final chapter. The lighthouse activation (sfx_lighthouse_on) is the emotional peak and should be preceded by 2s of near-silence.
bgm_chapters.production_notes: The only chapter where full ensemble is justified. Every instrument is added slowly, as if being restored along with the island. Nothing added before it is earned.

bgm_scenes.emotional_tone: Gentle invitation — the island is waiting, peaceful, no urgency
bgm_scenes.production_notes: Should feel like the opening credits of a Studio Ghibli film. Player should feel safe and welcomed.

bgm_scenes.description: Short non-looping stinger played on level clear screen
instruments: single wind chime accent at peak
bgm_scenes.emotional_tone: Warm accomplishment — gentle, not triumphant; satisfaction without fanfare
bgm_scenes.production_notes: 4-note ascending arpeggio + single resonant chord hold. Fades naturally to silence. Transitions to BGM resume after.

bgm_scenes.description: Chapter restoration ceremony — played when chapter's island area is visually restored
bgm_scenes.emotional_tone: Emotional release — the island is alive again; earned, quiet, profound
bgm_scenes.production_notes: One sting per chapter unlock. The full 6-chapter journey should feel like progressively more instruments are joining. Ch1 restoration = simplest, Ch6 = most layered.

restoration_variants.chapter_6_variant: Full ensemble including distant bell (triggers sfx_lighthouse_on)

bgm_scenes.description: One-time lighthouse illumination sequence — game's ultimate emotional climax
bgm_scenes.emotional_tone: The island restored — quiet triumph, tears welcome, no words needed
bgm_scenes.production_notes: This plays ONCE in the player's lifetime. Preceded by 2s near-silence. Must earn every second. Should work as a standalone piece. The moment the lighthouse light sweeps across the island — this is Japanese concept of 物の哀れ (mono no aware) rendered in sound.

voice_style.delivery_philosophy: Sound suggests emotion. Words carry meaning. Never both at once.

律_yamada_ritz.voice_approach: No voice. Internal monologue is text only.
律_yamada_ritz.audio_cue: Ambient music swells subtly during key journal/reflection moments
律_yamada_ritz.chapter_complete_murmur: Optional faint exhale or 'ん...' — delivered via text typing effect with subtle breath audio
律_yamada_ritz.notes: 律 is the player's vessel. Voice would break immersion. Silence is character.

allowed_vocalizations.note: Soft, two-syllable call — appears in emotional chapter moments
Soft laugh — two syllables, gentle, not loud

hinata.notes: Voice recorded breathy, warm, close-mic. Never projected. Feels like the person next to you speaking, not performing.

npc_磯部健三.character: 磯部健三 (Harbor fisherman — gruff warmth)

vocalizations.note: Gruff warm laugh — occasional, earned, not frequent

npc_磯部健三.timbre: Low, resonant, chest voice. Warm despite roughness.

vocalizations.note: Wordless melody hum while working — no specific syllables, just warmth

npc_桐島梅子.timbre: Mid-range, calm, slightly raspy with age. Like someone who has found their place.

vocalizations.note: Surprised exclamation when discovering rare plants — bright, genuine

npc_海野夏帆.timbre: Bright, higher register, enthusiastic but not loud.

npc_丸山冬子.character: 丸山冬子 (Stone path hermit — near silence)

vocalizations.note: Single rare vocalization — extremely quiet, deeply sincere. Triggers only once in the game.

npc_丸山冬子.timbre: Almost a whisper. Elderly. Fragile but not weak.

npc_丸山渉.character: 丸山渉 (Absent — appears only through journal)
npc_丸山渉.audio_approach: Journal reading = text only. Ambient music swells during journal entries. No voice ever.
npc_丸山渉.notes: Absence is presence. The swelling ambient music IS his voice.

adaptive_system.description: Three-layer adaptive music system that responds to player engagement without ever jarring

layers.name: base
layers.description: Always playing — ambient/environmental sounds specific to each chapter area

layers.name: melody
layers.description: Primary musical melody layer — instruments carrying the chapter theme
layers.trigger_condition: fade_in after 10+ seconds of active puzzle engagement
layers.fade_out_condition: player pauses or exits level — 5 second fade out
layers.notes: Ensures first moments in a level are peaceful ambient only. Music rewards engagement.

layers.name: intensity
layers.description: Additional layer activated by combo chains — adds texture and energy
layers.notes: Subtle. Should feel like the music notices the combo, not react frantically. Small percussion or secondary instrument.

crossfade_rules.exception: lighthouse_finale — always fades in from near-silence, no previous music overlap

low_resource_mode.notes: Ambient base layer alone should always feel complete and appropriate. Never silent.

session_variation.description: Long sessions should feel different from short sessions
session_variation.mechanism: Hour-long ambient variations on base layer. Melody layer uses variant recordings. Time-of-day parameter (if device clock available) shifts ambience warmth.

asset_list.description: Chapter 2 — Pottery Studio BGM (3 adaptive layers)
Chapter 3 — Coastal Forest BGM (3 adaptive layers)
Chapter 4 — Stone Path BGM (3 adaptive layers)
Chapter 5 — Cliff Lookout BGM (3 adaptive layers)
Chapter 6 — Lighthouse BGM (dynamic, non-looping main + ambient fallback loop)
asset_list.duration: non-loop main: 8-10 min + ambient fallback loop: 2 min

asset_list.description: 磯部健三 — 'はは' warm laugh
桐島梅子 — contented wordless hum
海野夏帆 — 'あっ' surprised exclamation
丸山冬子 — '…ありがとう' near-whisper (one-time)

audio_manager_integration.fade_behavior: All BGM transitions use tween-based volume fade — no hard cuts
audio_manager_integration.volume_persistence: BGM and SFX volumes persisted to sys.localStorage
audio_manager_integration.adaptive_system_note: Current AudioManager.ts supports single BGM source. Adaptive 3-layer system requires extending to multi-source or using a dedicated AdaptiveBGMManager class. Suggested sprint: beta milestone.
